step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image features a ZONNIC product tin centered on a white background, with the ZONNIC logo both as a headline and on the tin. There is a green halo behind the C and a dark/filled circle behind the Z, making halos visible on both ends. Regulatory warnings are prominent at the top and bottom, and the overall palette is navy blue, green, and white.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image features a ZONNIC product tin centered on a white background, with the ZONNIC logo both as a headline and on the tin. There is a green halo behind the C and a dark/filled circle behind the Z, making halos visible on both ends. Regulatory warnings are prominent at the top and bottom, and the overall palette is navy blue, green, and white.
CONTENT TYPE: educational

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: center (on product tin, also as headline text above tin)
  Text colour: navy blue
  Distorted or modified: NO
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: medium (headline logo is prominent, tin logo is smaller but clear)

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): YES ⚠ WRONG LETTER!
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): YES (correct)
  Halo on other letters: Z
  Halo colour: green (on C), dark/filled (on Z, likely navy or dark blue)
  Halo is gradient (two colours): NO — solid single colour (on white/grey background the halo MUST be a gradient per LOGO-05)
  Gradient colours: green (C), navy/dark (Z)
  Shape: circle
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: NO

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: white
  Colours: white with very light grey shadowing
  Gradient direction: not present
  Description: solid white background with subtle shadow under the tin

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: PRESENT
    Position: top of image (large box), also on tin
    Text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive. Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking. AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine. La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes qui désirent cesser de fumer.
    Bilingual: YES
  18+ age icon: PRESENT
    Position: bottom left
  Risk communication: PRESENT
    Position: bottom of image

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: bold sans-serif (logo and headline), regular sans-serif (body and regulatory text)
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: New to ZONNIC? Here's how it works...

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: navy blue, green, white
  Flavour palette match: Green/Mint
  Secondary colour usage: green used as accent (halo, tin edge, some text)

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary:
This image features a ZONNIC product tin centered on a clean white background, with the ZONNIC logo shown both as a bold navy blue headline and on the tin itself. The C letter in the logo has a green circular halo, but there is also a dark circle behind the Z letter, which is not permitted. The C halo is a solid colour rather than a gradient, which is required on white backgrounds. Regulatory elements are all present: a bilingual nicotine warning at the top, an 18+ icon at the bottom left, and risk communication text at the bottom, all in clear sans-serif fonts. The overall palette uses navy blue, green, and white, matching the mint flavour profile, and the secondary green is used only as an accent. 

While the image gets most regulatory and colour details right, there are two major brand violations: a circle is incorrectly placed behind the Z letter, and the C halo is a solid colour instead of a gradient on white. These issues undermine the integrity of the ZONNIC logo and must be corrected for full compliance.

checks_performed.detail: Bilingual nicotine warning is present at the top of the image in both English and French.
18+ age restriction icon is present at the bottom left of the image.
Risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
ZONNIC logo is clearly visible as a headline and on the product tin.
Logo text is navy blue on a white background, which is correct.
A circular halo is present on the C (correct), but there is also a circle behind the Z letter, which is not allowed.
Logo is altered by adding a circle behind the Z letter, which is not permitted.
Background is solid white, which is acceptable for educational content.
No gradient background is present, so gradient direction and split do not apply.
Content is educational and uses a white background, which is permitted.
Only approved brand colours (navy blue, green, white) are used, matching the mint flavour palette.
All text uses a bold and regular sans-serif font consistent with brand guidelines.
No grey gradient background is used, so these rules do not apply.
Logo has sufficient clear space around it.
Halo and logo do not blend into the background, and there are no additional shapes or containers.

violations.rule_text: Don't add the halo on the Z instead of the C.
violations.issue: There is a circular shape (halo) behind the Z letter in the ZONNIC logo, which is not allowed. Only the C should have a halo.
violations.fix_suggestion: Remove the circle or halo behind the Z letter so that only the C has a halo.
violations.evidence: A dark/filled circle is visible behind the Z letter in both the headline and tin logo.

violations.rule_text: Don't outline other letters in the logo (only C gets the halo).
violations.issue: A circular outline/halo is present behind the Z letter, which is not permitted. Only the C should have a halo.
violations.fix_suggestion: Remove any outline or halo from the Z letter so that only the C is highlighted.
violations.evidence: A dark circle is visible behind the Z letter.

violations.rule_text: The logo should never be altered or recreated in any way.
violations.issue: The logo is altered by adding a circle behind the Z letter, which is not part of the official design.
violations.fix_suggestion: Use only the official ZONNIC logo with the halo behind the C and no other letters.
violations.evidence: Logo shows a circle behind the Z letter.

violations.rule_text: On a white or grey gradient background, the C halo must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours.
violations.issue: The C halo is a solid green colour on a white background, but it should be a gradient using both primary and secondary colours.
violations.fix_suggestion: Update the C halo to use a gradient (not a solid colour) on white backgrounds.
violations.evidence: C halo is solid green, not a gradient.
